steps.title: Use the past-time marker
steps.content: The exhibition “ran in early 2022,” a completed point in the past. The verb describing what Derek Eller Gallery did with Moon's work must match that completed past action.

steps.title: Choose past tense
steps.content: Choice A is present tense, Choice B is present perfect passive, and Choice D is future tense. The sentence needs the simple past verb for an exhibition that already happened. The answer is C.
